Toolstation Catalogue Copy:

Natural wood colours are no longer the only option for the garden fence. Cuprinol Ducksback Shed and Fence Treatment colours and weatherproofs rough-sawn timbers, helping you transform fences, sheds, trellises or pergolas into stylish garden features.
